Hero.title: Fast help at your door
Hero.subtitle: Locked out, broken key, or lost key. We provide reliable door openings in the Heidelberg area for private individuals, landlords, and public authorities.
Hero.imageAlt: Panoramic view of Heidelberg with castle and old town
Hero.trustLine: Local, fixed prices on the phone, personal service

SeoIntro.title: Locksmith & emergency locksmith in Heidelberg & the Rhine-Neckar region
SeoIntro.p1: As an emergency locksmith in Heidelberg, we see the same urgent situations again and again: the flat door shut behind you, the key left inside, a sticky cylinder, or a broken key. We support private households, landlords, and businesses across Heidelberg and the Rhine-Neckar area, and we explain clearly on the phone what kind of door opening or cylinder change is likely needed.
SeoIntro.p2: Fixed prices are part of how we work: before we head out, you get a clear quote so you are not left guessing in a stressful moment. As a small business (Kleinunternehmer), VAT is not shown on invoices; we pass that advantage on transparently. Beyond simple and complex door openings, we advise on lock changes and sensible burglary protection where it fits the job.
SeoIntro.p3: Our focus is fast help, clear communication, and practical solutions on site. If you are locked out or want to improve security, call us. We coordinate arrival and next steps and stick to the agreed fixed price as long as the situation on site does not differ materially from what you described.

items.title: Short response time
items.description: We are based in Heidelberg and reach you quickly. You get an estimated arrival time on the phone.

items.title: No VAT shown, fair pricing
items.description: As a small business (Kleinunternehmer), VAT is not shown on invoices. We pass that advantage on to you.

items.title: Day & night
items.description: We are available around the clock. You can also check our hours on Google Maps.

Services.title: Services
Services.subtitle: Fixed prices, transparent and fair.
Services.intro: We offer our services at fixed prices.

simple.title: Simple door opening
simple.description: The door is only pulled shut, not locked. That counts as a simple opening.

difficult.title: Complex door opening
difficult.description: When the door is locked, for example with a lost or broken key.

cylinder.title: Cylinder change (lock change)
cylinder.description: Replacement due to wear, security upgrades, or after key loss.

extra.title: Additional services & surcharges
items: Lock defects (key stuck, spins freely), price on request

items.q: Do you open doors without damage?
items.a: If the door is only pulled shut and not locked, we usually open it without damage, except for very narrow gaps or stiff latches. We then check alternatives (e.g. a window) before drilling the cylinder.

items.q: Will you quote a final price on the phone?
items.a: Yes. After you describe the situation, we give a final price with no hidden costs. Rarely it may change if a technique cannot be applied.

items.q: What payment methods do you accept?
items.a: Cash and debit (EC) card. You receive an invoice and receipt. We do not offer payment on invoice.

items.q: How long does an opening take?
items.a: Travel is often longer than the opening itself. Pulled-shut door: often ~10 minutes; locked door: up to ~30 minutes.

items.q: Do I get an invoice and receipt?
Will home contents insurance cover the cost?
items.a: That depends on your policy. If your key was stolen, reimbursement is often possible. Ask your insurer.

Legal.privacyDescription: How we process personal data when you use this website.

content.text: VAT identification number pursuant to § 27 a of the German VAT Act: DE369507966
The European Commission provides a platform for online dispute resolution (ODR): https://ec.europa.eu/consumers/odr/. You can find our email address in the imprint above.
We are not willing or obliged to participate in dispute resolution proceedings before a consumer arbitration board.
The following notes provide a simple overview of what happens to your personal data when you visit this website. Personal data is any data with which you can be personally identified.
The controller responsible for processing data on this website is Florian Weineck, Laubenweg 3, 69123 Heidelberg, Germany, phone +49 174 7120901, email info@schlüsselnotdienst-weineck.de.

This website is hosted by an external provider. This may process IP addresses, browser type, and access times in server logs. Processing is based on Art. 6 (1) lit. f GDPR (legitimate interest in secure and efficient provision).

This website may embed a map from Google Maps. The map only loads after you agree (“Accept all” or “Show map here”). The provider is Google Ireland Limited, Gordon House, Barrow Street, Dublin 4, Ireland. Data (including IP address) may be transferred to Google and cookies may be set. See Google’s privacy policy: https://policies.google.com/privacy. The legal basis for processing with consent is Art. 6 (1) lit. a GDPR.
You have the right to access, rectification, erasure, restriction of processing, data portability, and objection. You also have the right to lodge a complaint with a supervisory authority.
